Omniya
Khalid

A visual storyteller drawn to the tension between light and dark — from moody urban streets to wide mountain skies. My work spans cinematic portraiture, landscape, and night photography, always searching for the frame that holds something true.

Portraiture Landscape Night Conceptual

— Omniya Khalid

Portraiture

"I shoot people the way I wish we'd be seen — fully, without apology."

My portrait work is built on trust and stillness. I am drawn to dramatic, directional light that sculpts the subject rather than flatters them. The goal is character over comfort — finding the version of someone that lives just beneath the surface.

StyleCinematic · Low-key lighting
EquipmentiPhone 16 Pro Max
EditingAdobe Lightroom · Photoshop
Based inKuala Lumpur, Malaysia
